message.content:
@startuml
title 微信扫码流程图

hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #D9D9E6
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #D9D9E6
  ActivationBorderColor #2E7D32
  ActivationBackgroundColor #98FB98
  ArrowColor #000000
  ArrowThickness 2
}

participant "用户" as U
participant "手机" as P
participant "微信" as W
participant "商家" as M

activate U

U -> P : 1 输入手机密码
activate P
P --> U : 2 打开手机
deactivate P

U -> W : 3 打开微信扫一扫
activate W
W --> U : 4 返回扫一扫界面

U -> M : 5.1 扫描商家收款码
activate M
M -> M : 5.2 生成收款二维码
M --> W : 5.3 返回收款二维码
deactivate M

W -> W : 5.4 读取识别商家收款码

W --> U : 6 提示输入微信支付密码
U -> W : 7.1 输入微信支付密码
W -> W : 7.2 微信验证用户输入密码正确

W -> M : 7.3 向商家汇款
activate M
M --> W : 7.4 汇款成功
deactivate M

W --> U : 8 提示用户支付成功
deactivate W

deactivate U
@enduml
